name: Block Party Blast
description: Block Party Blast is the most satisfying block puzzle game youll play! Place colorful pieces on the board, clear rows and columns, and chain combos for massive bonus points. Master 4 special blocks — bombs, rainbows, multipliers and locked cells. Use 6 powerful power-ups strategically. Play 50 handcrafted levels or go endless! Defeat 5 hilarious cartoon bosses and upgrade your skills in the shop. Three difficulty modes, full progress saving!
instructions: Place blocks to fill rows and columns mdash clear them for points Chain combos use power-ups defeat cartoon bosses Two modes 50 Levels or Endless
